description:
Displays a resource defined in RscTitles. Also see [[cutRsc]], with these two commands you can show two different resources at once.
{{Feature|arma3|{{GVI|arma3|1.58}} Multiple layers and map overlays are possible with [[cutRsc]] which provides more options and handles layers better.}}
name: titleRsc

Item.desc: the class name of the resource. ("Default" will remove the current resource)
Item.name: text

Item.desc: can be one of: "PLAIN", "PLAIN DOWN", "BLACK", "BLACK FADED", "BLACK OUT", "BLACK IN", "WHITE OUT" and "WHITE IN"; see [[Title Effect Type]]s for more information about these values
Item.name: type

Item.desc: time in seconds to fade in resource
Item.name: speed

Item.desc: [[false]] to hide the text when the map is opened
Item.name: showInMap
